programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Olivia and Sally become medical detectives as they examine a woman having a potential stroke. Paramedic Bill races to a man having seizures. The patient is going downhill fast and could lash out at the very people trying to save him.

programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.

programme.title: Real Emergency: Episode
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.

programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Nhi and Carlos under pressure to bring an overdose patient back from the brink of death. Laura and Aaron come across a shockingly injured motorbike rider. Ben and Tarnya apply their superhero skills to a toddler struggling to breathe.

programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.
